Home / Departments / Project Management

End-to-End
Project Management

Expert delivery from pre-construction through close-out, with full DoD compliance and proven methodology.

Start a Project Our Services
Overview

Service Overview

GMP's project management department plans, directs, and controls complex construction programs with disciplined communication, quality assurance, and documentation. We bring extensive Department of Defense and federal experience—so schedules, compliance, and mission readiness stay in lockstep from kickoff through turnover.

Capabilities

What We Deliver

DoD Contract Management

Structured governance for defense and federal programs—requirements traceability, change control, and stakeholder alignment across the contract lifecycle.

Federal Project Compliance

Documentation, reporting, and process rigor aligned with federal acquisition and construction standards so deliverables pass scrutiny.

Security Clearance Coordination

Sequencing of cleared personnel, site access, and subcontractor compliance to protect sensitive environments without slowing delivery.

Rapid Deployment Planning

Compressed schedules with parallel workstreams, early procurement, and logistics playbooks built for fast mobilization.

Risk Assessment & Mitigation

Identification of schedule, cost, and operational risks with mitigations tracked to owners and decision milestones.

Quality Assurance Programs

Inspection and test plans, hold points, and digital records that prove workmanship and spec conformance at turnover.

DoD Federal program fluency
QA Documented conformance
PMO Single source of truth
Outcomes

Value We Create

On-Time Delivery

Milestone-driven planning and field coordination keep critical paths visible and actionable through closeout.

Budget Adherence

Forecasting, earned value discipline, and scope control protect funding lines while preserving mission outcomes.

Full Compliance

Federal, safety, and contractual requirements embedded in workflows—not bolted on at the end.

Risk Mitigation

Early signals, contingency planning, and cross-functional reviews reduce surprises during execution.

Transparent Reporting

Executive-ready dashboards and written status so sponsors see progress, blockers, and decisions clearly.

360° Schedule & cost visibility
Fed Compliance-first workflows
RACI Clear ownership & escalation
ROI Fewer rework cycles
Platforms

Tools & Platforms

We meet teams where they work—common construction and program platforms integrated into reporting rhythms you can audit.

ProcoreMicrosoft ProjectBIM 360PlanGridAutoCADPrimavera P6

Program discipline that survives inspection

Whether you are mobilizing a federal facility or a commercial campus, we bring governance, transparency, and field leadership that hold up under pressure.
